name: insert_unmap_preserves_unique
reason: Inserting an Unmap that replaces an existing Map entry silently drops the uniqueness constraint for that Map — the old Map is removed and replaced by Unmap without checking if another thread had a duplicate

name: insert_idle_over_map_preserves_unique
reason: Overwriting a Map entry with Idle preserves uniqueness — tests that removing an in-flight map by going Idle doesn't break the invariant even if the map was the only thing preventing a duplicate

name: if_map_then_unique_vacuous_for_non_map
code:
proof fn phi_3_if_map_then_unique_vacuous_for_non_map(thread_state: Map<nat, ThreadState>, id: nat)
    requires
        thread_state.contains_key(id),
        !(thread_state[id] is Map),
    ensures
        if_map_then_unique(thread_state, id),
{
}
reason: `if_map_then_unique` is vacuously true for non-Map entries — the uniqueness check provides no protection for Unmap or Idle thread states

name: inflight_maps_unique_empty
reason: The empty thread state trivially satisfies uniqueness — the universal quantifier over an empty domain is vacuously true

name: uniqueness_value_equality_not_frame_overlap
reason: Two inflight maps with identical PTEs (same physical frame) but different vaddrs pass uniqueness because `if_map_then_unique` compares full `ThreadState` values including vaddr — allows double-mapping the same physical frame concurrently
